name: HWM_TM_AUDITS
description: The Time change audit (TA) table stores one row for each time entry.

columns.Name: TM_AUDIT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updateable

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: TM_RECORD_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: reference to the time record group (time card)

columns.Name: USAGES_TYPE
columns.Comments: 1 = RECORD, can take other value in the future

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Action performed on the referenced item

columns.Name: REF_DATE
columns.Comments: The date to which this Time Record is assigned

columns.Name: TM_BLK_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the time record (created, deleted or before)

columns.Name: TM_BLK_VERSION
columns.Comments: Version of the time record  (created, deleted or before)

columns.Name: TM_NEW_BLK_ID
columns.Comments: in case of update action, Id of the time record after update

columns.Name: TM_NEW_BLK_VERSION
columns.Comments: Version of the time record after update or create

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Code referencing a Lookup value.

columns.Name: ORIG_AUDIT_ID
columns.Comments: Reference the initial audit rows when updating the reason attribute

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PART_DATE
columns.Comments: partition key

columns.Name: PART_GRP_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: partition key

columns.Name: CHANGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the corresponding change made on the time entry.

columns.Name: CHANGED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who made the corresponding change on the time entry.

columns.Name: REASON_CHANGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of when the Change Reason of this audit row is updated.
